sqlMap.select: select distinct field from property where structureno = #structureno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# order by field
select * from property where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into property(propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno field persistent nullconstraint keyconstraint autoincrement defaultvalue defaultvaluetype listdisplay formdisplay searchfield contextfield resolvedisplay deleteind seq developercomments helptext tiptext type propertylength align viewlength isEncrypt userdefineunittestcase alias decimallength eval ) values (#propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC# #field# #persistent# #nullconstraint# #keyconstraint# #autoincrement# #defaultvalue# #defaultvaluetype# #listdisplay# #formdisplay# #searchfield# #contextfield# #resolvedisplay# #deleteind# #seq# #developercomments# #helptext# #tiptext# #type# #propertylength# #align# #viewlength# #isEncrypt# #userdefineunittestcase# #alias# #decimallength# #eval# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('property') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select propertyno, field, persistent, nullconstraint, keyconstraint, autoincrement, defaultvalue, defaultvaluetype, listdisplay, formdisplay, searchfield, contextfield, resolvedisplay, deleteind, seq, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, type, propertylength, align, viewlength, isEncrypt, userdefineunittestcase, alias, decimallength, eval, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from property where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update property set
field = #field# field = null persistent = #persistent# persistent = null nullconstraint = #nullconstraint# nullconstraint = null keyconstraint = #keyconstraint# keyconstraint = null autoincrement = #autoincrement# autoincrement = null defaultvalue = #defaultvalue# defaultvalue = null defaultvaluetype = #defaultvaluetype# defaultvaluetype = null listdisplay = #listdisplay# listdisplay = null formdisplay = #formdisplay# formdisplay = null searchfield = #searchfield# searchfield = null contextfield = #contextfield# contextfield = null resolvedisplay = #resolvedisplay# resolvedisplay = null deleteind = #deleteind# deleteind = null seq = #seq# seq = null developercomments = #developercomments# developercomments = null helptext = #helptext# helptext = null tiptext = #tiptext# tiptext = null type = #type# type = null propertylength = #propertylength# propertylength = null align = #align# align = null viewlength = #viewlength# viewlength = null isEncrypt = #isEncrypt# isEncrypt = null userdefineunittestcase = #userdefineunittestcase# userdefineunittestcase = null alias = #alias# alias = null decimallength = #decimallength# decimallength = null eval = #eval# eval = null
where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from property where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from property where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select propertyno, field, persistent, nullconstraint, keyconstraint, autoincrement, defaultvalue, defaultvaluetype, listdisplay, formdisplay, searchfield, contextfield, resolvedisplay, deleteind, seq, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, type, propertylength, align, viewlength, isEncrypt, userdefineunittestcase, alias, decimallength, eval, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from property where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, field, nullconstraint, listdisplay, formdisplay, searchfield, contextfield, resolvedisplay, deleteind, seq, isEncrypt, alias from property where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
field like #field# + '%' tiptext like #tiptext# + '%'
select distinct field from property where structureno = #structureno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# order by field
select distinct field from property where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno# order by field
